---
title: "child_02_double_ml"
author: "Alexander Unger"
date: "2026-06-02"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# ANGRIST & EVANS (1998) — CHILDBEARING AND LABOUR SUPPLY: DML EXTENSION
# Builds on child_repl_30 — run that first (all kappa objects must be in memory).
#
# Design:
#   Z = samesex   (1 if first two children same sex)
#   D = morekids  (1 if third child)
#   Y = workedm   (LFP, binary) and lincomem (log income, dollars)
#
# Near one-sided noncompliance: almost no always-takers.
# samesex is near-random (p ≈ 0.5) → design dominates learner, as in Vietnam.
#
# WHY ONLY WALD-AIPW (NOT AIPW-ATE)?
# ------------------------------------
# Under near one-sided noncompliance, AIPW-ATE requires estimating E[Y|D=0,X]
# in the always-taker stratum, which is near-empty. dml_with_smoother() returns
# NaN for AIPW-ATE in this design. Only PLR-IV and Wald-AIPW are reported.
#
# OUTCOME SPECIFICATIONS:
#   LFP:    workedm (0/1), workedm_21 (+1 shift), workedm_01 (1 - workedm)
#   Income: lincomem (dollars), lincomem_cnt (cents), lincomem_ths (thousands)
#
# STRUCTURE:
#   BLOCK A — Setup, helpers, X matrices
#   BLOCK B — LFP outcome: workedm (main spec)
#   BLOCK C — Income outcome: lincomem (main spec)
#   BLOCK D — Translation invariance: LFP (binary outcome)
#   BLOCK E — Translation invariance: Log income
#   BLOCK F — Weight diagnostics: DML vs kappa (both outcomes)
#   BLOCK G — Love plots (full covariate spec)
#   BLOCK H — Summary point-estimates table
# ==============================================================================


# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK A — SETUP
# Requires: child_repl_30 objects in memory.
# ==============================================================================

library(OutcomeWeights)   # dml_with_smoother(), get_outcome_weights()
library(cobalt)           # love.plot()
library(viridis)          # colour palette
library(gridExtra)        # grid.arrange()
library(ggplot2)          # required by OutcomeWeights

stopifnot(
  exists("ae98_lfp"), exists("ae98_income"),
  exists("kappa_weights"), exists("tau_u"), exists("tau_a10"),
  exists("tau_unnorm"), exists("logit_mle"), exists("get_cbps_p"),
  exists("kappa_outcome_weights"), exists("weight_diag")
)

# Shorthands
Z_lfp    <- ae98_lfp$samesex
D_lfp    <- ae98_lfp$morekids
Z_inc    <- ae98_income$samesex
D_inc    <- ae98_income$morekids

# Outcomes: LFP
Y_lfp    <- ae98_lfp$workedm          # 1 if worked, 0 otherwise
Y_lfp_21 <- ae98_lfp$workedm_21       # 2 if worked, 1 otherwise  (+1 shift)
Y_lfp_01 <- ae98_lfp$workedm_01       # 1 if did not work, 0 otherwise

# Outcomes: income
Y_inc_dol <- ae98_income$lincomem      # log income, dollars
Y_inc_cnt <- ae98_income$lincomem_cnt  # log income, cents  = Y_dol + log(100)
Y_inc_ths <- ae98_income$lincomem_ths  # log income, $1000s = Y_dol - log(1000)

k_inc <- log(100)   # translation constant for cents vs. dollars
k_ths <- log(1000)  # translation constant for thousands vs. dollars

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# make_X(): strips model.matrix attributes → clean numeric matrix for grf
# grf/OutcomeWeights requires ncol >= 2
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
make_X <- function(formula, data) {
  mm <- model.matrix(formula, data = data)
  m  <- matrix(as.numeric(mm), nrow = nrow(mm), ncol = ncol(mm))
  colnames(m) <- colnames(mm)
  m
}

# DML design matrices — full covariate set (no intercept for grf)
# LFP sample
X_dml_lfp <- make_X(
  ~ 0 + agem + agefstm + sexk + sex2nd + blackm + hispm + othracem,
  ae98_lfp
)

# Income sample
X_dml_inc <- make_X(
  ~ 0 + agem + agefstm + sexk + sex2nd + blackm + hispm + othracem,
  ae98_income
)

# Kappa X matrices — WITH intercept (for logit_mle / cbps)
X_kappa_lfp <- make_X_ae(ae98_lfp)
X_kappa_inc <- make_X_ae(ae98_income)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# get_estimate(): extract point estimate from dml summary matrix
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
get_estimate <- function(res, row_name) {
  if ("Estimate" %in% colnames(res)) return(as.numeric(res[row_name, "Estimate"]))
  as.numeric(res[row_name, 1])
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# check_weight_identity(): verify omega'Y = tau_hat (Knaus 2024 algebraic check)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
check_weight_identity <- function(w, Y, estimate, tol = 1e-8) {
  isTRUE(all.equal(sum(w * Y), estimate, tolerance = tol))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# check_omega_rows(): guard against missing rows in omega object
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
check_omega_rows <- function(omega_obj, rows = c("PLR-IV", "Wald-AIPW")) {
  missing_rows <- setdiff(rows, rownames(omega_obj$omega))
  if (length(missing_rows) > 0)
    stop("Missing outcome-weight rows: ", paste(missing_rows, collapse = ", "))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# kappa_weights_bundle(): outcome weights for all six kappa estimators
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
kappa_weights_bundle <- function(Z, D, X_kappa) {
  p_ml <- logit_mle(Z, X_kappa)
  p_cb <- get_cbps_p(Z, X_kappa)        # note: pass Z explicitly
  
  kw_ml <- kappa_outcome_weights(Z, D, p_ml)
  kw_cb <- kappa_outcome_weights(Z, D, p_cb)
  
  list(
    tau_cb_u   = kw_cb$w_u,
    tau_ml_u   = kw_ml$w_u,
    tau_ml_a10 = kw_ml$w_a10,
    tau_ml_a   = kw_ml$w_a,
    tau_ml_a1  = kw_ml$w_a1,
    tau_ml_a0  = kw_ml$w_a0,
    p_ml       = p_ml,
    p_cb       = p_cb
  )
}

cat(sprintf(
  "BLOCK A ready.  LFP: N=%d | Income: N=%d | mean(Z_lfp)=%.3f\n\n",
  nrow(ae98_lfp), nrow(ae98_income), mean(Z_lfp)
))


```

```{r}


# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK B — LFP OUTCOME: workedm
# Y = 1 if worked, 0 otherwise   (main LFP spec)
# Full covariate set: age, age at first birth, child sex dummies, race dummies
# ==============================================================================
#
# Note: samesex is near-random (p ≈ 0.5) across all covariate cells.
# As in Vietnam, "design dominates learner": ESS and % negative weights will be
# nearly identical across PLR-IV, Wald-AIPW, and kappa estimators.

set.seed(42)
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK B — DML: LFP outcome (workedm)\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

dml_lfp <- dml_with_smoother(Y_lfp, D_lfp, X_dml_lfp, Z_lfp,
                             n_cf_folds = 5, tune.parameters = "all")
res_lfp <- summary(dml_lfp)

cat("Point estimates (IV rows only):\n")
print(res_lfp[c("PLR-IV", "Wald-AIPW"), , drop = FALSE])

# Extract outcome weights
omega_lfp      <- get_outcome_weights(dml_lfp)
check_omega_rows(omega_lfp)
w_plriv_lfp    <- as.vector(omega_lfp$omega["PLR-IV",    ])
w_waldaipw_lfp <- as.vector(omega_lfp$omega["Wald-AIPW", ])

cat("\nAlgebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat, must be TRUE):\n")
cat("  PLR-IV:   ",
    check_weight_identity(w_plriv_lfp,    Y_lfp, get_estimate(res_lfp, "PLR-IV")),    "\n")
cat("  Wald-AIPW:",
    check_weight_identity(w_waldaipw_lfp, Y_lfp, get_estimate(res_lfp, "Wald-AIPW")), "\n\n")

cat("Weight diagnostics (Sum_w = 0 => translation invariant):\n")
print(rbind(
  weight_diag(w_plriv_lfp,    "PLR-IV     (DML, LFP)"),
  weight_diag(w_waldaipw_lfp, "Wald-AIPW  (DML, LFP)")
), row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nBLOCK B done. Objects: dml_lfp, w_plriv_lfp, w_waldaipw_lfp\n\n")

```


```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK C — INCOME OUTCOME: lincomem (log income, dollars)
# Y = log(incomem)   (main income spec; positive-income subsample)
# ==============================================================================

set.seed(42)
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK C — DML: Income outcome (lincomem, dollars)\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

dml_inc <- dml_with_smoother(Y_inc_dol, D_inc, X_dml_inc, Z_inc,
                             n_cf_folds = 5, tune.parameters = "all")
res_inc <- summary(dml_inc)

cat("Point estimates (IV rows only):\n")
print(res_inc[c("PLR-IV", "Wald-AIPW"), , drop = FALSE])

omega_inc      <- get_outcome_weights(dml_inc)
check_omega_rows(omega_inc)
w_plriv_inc    <- as.vector(omega_inc$omega["PLR-IV",    ])
w_waldaipw_inc <- as.vector(omega_inc$omega["Wald-AIPW", ])

cat("\nAlgebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat, must be TRUE):\n")
cat("  PLR-IV:   ",
    check_weight_identity(w_plriv_inc,    Y_inc_dol, get_estimate(res_inc, "PLR-IV")),    "\n")
cat("  Wald-AIPW:",
    check_weight_identity(w_waldaipw_inc, Y_inc_dol, get_estimate(res_inc, "Wald-AIPW")), "\n\n")

cat("Weight diagnostics (Sum_w = 0 => translation invariant):\n")
print(rbind(
  weight_diag(w_plriv_inc,    "PLR-IV     (DML, income)"),
  weight_diag(w_waldaipw_inc, "Wald-AIPW  (DML, income)")
), row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nBLOCK C done. Objects: dml_inc, w_plriv_inc, w_waldaipw_inc\n\n")

```



```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK D — TRANSLATION INVARIANCE: LFP (binary outcome)
# Requires: BLOCK B.
#
# For any estimator tau_hat = sum_i omega_i Y_i:
#   Y_21 = Y_lfp + 1  =>  tau_hat(Y_21) - tau_hat(Y_lfp) = 1 * sum(omega)
#   Y_01 = 1 - Y_lfp  =>  tau_hat(Y_01) = -tau_hat(Y_lfp)  [scale + translate]
#
# Normalized kappa estimators and fully-normalized DML estimators satisfy
# sum(omega) = 0, so the estimate is unchanged by the +1 shift.
# Unnormalized estimators will differ across all three codings.
# ==============================================================================
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK D — TRANSLATION INVARIANCE: LFP\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

k_lfp <- 1  # translation constant (workedm -> workedm + 1)

print_ti_lfp <- function() {
  kw <- kappa_weights_bundle(Z_lfp, D_lfp, X_kappa_lfp)
  p_ml <- kw$p_ml;  p_cb <- kw$p_cb
  
  cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %9s  %9s  %9s  %9s  %7s\n",
              "Estimator", "Y=0/1", "Y=1/2", "Y_01(raw)", "-Y_01", "TI?"))
  cat(strrep("-", 80), "\n")
  
  rows <- list(
    list(name = "PLR-IV",
         w    = w_plriv_lfp,
         e01  = sum(w_plriv_lfp * Y_lfp),
         e21  = sum(w_plriv_lfp * Y_lfp_21)),
    
    list(name = "Wald-AIPW",
         w    = w_waldaipw_lfp,
         e01  = sum(w_waldaipw_lfp * Y_lfp),
         e21  = sum(w_waldaipw_lfp * Y_lfp_21)),
    
    list(name = "tau_cb_u",
         w    = kw$tau_cb_u,
         e01  = tau_u(Y_lfp, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_cb),
         e21  = tau_u(Y_lfp_21, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_cb)),
    
    list(name = "tau_ml_u",
         w    = kw$tau_ml_u,
         e01  = tau_u(Y_lfp, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml),
         e21  = tau_u(Y_lfp_21, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml)),
    
    list(name = "tau_ml_a10",
         w    = kw$tau_ml_a10,
         e01  = tau_a10(Y_lfp, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml),
         e21  = tau_a10(Y_lfp_21, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml)),
    
    list(name = "tau_ml_a",
         w    = kw$tau_ml_a,
         e01  = tau_unnorm(Y_lfp, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml, "a"),
         e21  = tau_unnorm(Y_lfp_21, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml, "a")),
    
    list(name = "tau_ml_a0",
         w    = kw$tau_ml_a0,
         e01  = tau_unnorm(Y_lfp, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml, "a0"),
         e21  = tau_unnorm(Y_lfp_21, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml, "a0"))
  )
  
  for (r in rows) {
    raw_01 <- -tau_u(Y_lfp_01, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml)   # placeholder sign convention
    # For display: use the actual estimate for Y_01 (sign-flipped for the "not work" version)
    e_01_raw <- if (grepl("PLR-IV",    r$name)) sum(w_plriv_lfp    * Y_lfp_01) else
      if (grepl("Wald-AIPW", r$name)) sum(w_waldaipw_lfp * Y_lfp_01) else
        if (grepl("tau_cb_u",  r$name)) tau_u(Y_lfp_01, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_cb)       else
          if (grepl("tau_ml_u",  r$name)) tau_u(Y_lfp_01, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml)       else
            if (grepl("a10",       r$name)) tau_a10(Y_lfp_01, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml)     else
              if (grepl("tau_ml_a$", r$name)) tau_unnorm(Y_lfp_01, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml, "a") else
                tau_unnorm(Y_lfp_01, Z_lfp, D_lfp, p_ml, "a0")
    
    diff21 <- r$e21 - r$e01
    ti_ok  <- isTRUE(all.equal(diff21, k_lfp * sum(r$w), tolerance = 1e-6))
    
    cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %9.4f  %9.4f  %9.4f  %9.4f  %7s\n",
                r$name, r$e01, r$e21, e_01_raw, -e_01_raw,
                if (ti_ok) "PASS" else "FAIL"))
  }
  cat("\n")
  cat("  Columns: Y=0/1 (original) | Y=1/2 (+1 shift) | Y_01 raw tau(1-Y) | -Y_01 (signed back)\n")
  cat("  PASS = |tau(Y+1) - tau(Y) - sum(omega)| < 1e-6\n\n")
}

print_ti_lfp()

cat("BLOCK D done.\n\n")

```


```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK E — TRANSLATION INVARIANCE: LOG INCOME
# Requires: BLOCK C.
#
# Three scalings: dollars, cents (+log(100)), $1000s (-log(1000)).
# Prediction: tau_hat(Y_cnt) - tau_hat(Y_dol) = log(100) * sum(omega)
#             => 0 for normalized, non-zero for unnormalized.
#
# This mirrors BLOCK D of the Vietnam DML exactly.
# ==============================================================================
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK E — TRANSLATION INVARIANCE: LOG INCOME\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

cat(sprintf("k (dollars → cents)     = log(100)  = %.6f\n",   k_inc))
cat(sprintf("k (dollars → thousands) = -log(1000) = %.6f\n\n", -k_ths))

print_ti_inc <- function() {
  kw <- kappa_weights_bundle(Z_inc, D_inc, X_kappa_inc)
  p_ml <- kw$p_ml;  p_cb <- kw$p_cb
  
  cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %9s  %9s  %9s  %10s  %10s  %7s\n",
              "Estimator", "Dollars", "Cents", "$1000s",
              "Diff(cnt)", "Diff(ths)", "TI?"))
  cat(strrep("-", 88), "\n")
  
  rows <- list(
    list(name = "PLR-IV",
         w    = w_plriv_inc,
         edol = sum(w_plriv_inc * Y_inc_dol),
         ecnt = sum(w_plriv_inc * Y_inc_cnt),
         eths = sum(w_plriv_inc * Y_inc_ths)),
    
    list(name = "Wald-AIPW",
         w    = w_waldaipw_inc,
         edol = sum(w_waldaipw_inc * Y_inc_dol),
         ecnt = sum(w_waldaipw_inc * Y_inc_cnt),
         eths = sum(w_waldaipw_inc * Y_inc_ths)),
    
    list(name = "tau_cb_u",
         w    = kw$tau_cb_u,
         edol = tau_u(Y_inc_dol, Z_inc, D_inc, p_cb),
         ecnt = tau_u(Y_inc_cnt, Z_inc, D_inc, p_cb),
         eths = tau_u(Y_inc_ths, Z_inc, D_inc, p_cb)),
    
    list(name = "tau_ml_u",
         w    = kw$tau_ml_u,
         edol = tau_u(Y_inc_dol, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml),
         ecnt = tau_u(Y_inc_cnt, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml),
         eths = tau_u(Y_inc_ths, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml)),
    
    list(name = "tau_ml_a10",
         w    = kw$tau_ml_a10,
         edol = tau_a10(Y_inc_dol, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml),
         ecnt = tau_a10(Y_inc_cnt, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml),
         eths = tau_a10(Y_inc_ths, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml)),
    
    list(name = "tau_ml_a",
         w    = kw$tau_ml_a,
         edol = tau_unnorm(Y_inc_dol, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml, "a"),
         ecnt = tau_unnorm(Y_inc_cnt, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml, "a"),
         eths = tau_unnorm(Y_inc_ths, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml, "a")),
    
    list(name = "tau_ml_a0",
         w    = kw$tau_ml_a0,
         edol = tau_unnorm(Y_inc_dol, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml, "a0"),
         ecnt = tau_unnorm(Y_inc_cnt, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml, "a0"),
         eths = tau_unnorm(Y_inc_ths, Z_inc, D_inc, p_ml, "a0"))
  )
  
  for (r in rows) {
    diff_cnt <- r$ecnt - r$edol
    diff_ths <- r$eths - r$edol
    pred_cnt <- sum(r$w) * k_inc
    pred_ths <- sum(r$w) * (-k_ths)
    ti_ok <- isTRUE(all.equal(diff_cnt, pred_cnt, tolerance = 1e-8)) &&
      isTRUE(all.equal(diff_ths, pred_ths, tolerance = 1e-8))
    
    cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %9.4f  %9.4f  %9.4f  %10.4f  %10.4f  %7s\n",
                r$name, r$edol, r$ecnt, r$eths,
                diff_cnt, diff_ths, if (ti_ok) "PASS" else "FAIL"))
  }
  cat("\n")
  cat("  PASS = diff equals sum(omega)*k to tolerance 1e-8\n\n")
}

print_ti_inc()

cat("BLOCK E done.\n\n")

```



```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK F — WEIGHT DIAGNOSTICS: DML VS KAPPA
# Requires: BLOCKS B and C.
#
# Key expected findings for AE design:
#   - samesex near-random → p ≈ 0.5 everywhere → design dominates learner
#   - ESS similar across all estimators (same as Vietnam finding)
#   - Near one-sided noncompliance → mean(kappa0) ≈ 0 → tau_ml_a0 explodes (near-zero denom)
#   - Wald-AIPW: Sum_w ≈ 0 (fully normalized); PLR-IV: Sum_w ≈ 0
# ==============================================================================
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK F — WEIGHT DIAGNOSTICS: DML VS KAPPA\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")
cat("Sum_w = 0 => translation invariant  |  ESS = 1 / sum(w_i^2)\n\n")

kw_lfp_bundle <- kappa_weights_bundle(Z_lfp, D_lfp, X_kappa_lfp)
kw_inc_bundle <- kappa_weights_bundle(Z_inc, D_inc, X_kappa_inc)

diag_lfp <- rbind(
  weight_diag(w_plriv_lfp,              "PLR-IV        (DML)"),
  weight_diag(w_waldaipw_lfp,           "Wald-AIPW     (DML)"),
  weight_diag(kw_lfp_bundle$tau_cb_u,   "tau_cb_u      (kappa)"),
  weight_diag(kw_lfp_bundle$tau_ml_u,   "tau_ml_u      (kappa)"),
  weight_diag(kw_lfp_bundle$tau_ml_a10, "tau_ml_a10    (kappa)"),
  weight_diag(kw_lfp_bundle$tau_ml_a,   "tau_ml_a      (kappa)"),
  weight_diag(kw_lfp_bundle$tau_ml_a1,  "tau_ml_a1/t   (kappa)"),
  weight_diag(kw_lfp_bundle$tau_ml_a0,  "tau_ml_a0     (kappa)")
)

diag_inc <- rbind(
  weight_diag(w_plriv_inc,              "PLR-IV        (DML)"),
  weight_diag(w_waldaipw_inc,           "Wald-AIPW     (DML)"),
  weight_diag(kw_inc_bundle$tau_cb_u,   "tau_cb_u      (kappa)"),
  weight_diag(kw_inc_bundle$tau_ml_u,   "tau_ml_u      (kappa)"),
  weight_diag(kw_inc_bundle$tau_ml_a10, "tau_ml_a10    (kappa)"),
  weight_diag(kw_inc_bundle$tau_ml_a,   "tau_ml_a      (kappa)"),
  weight_diag(kw_inc_bundle$tau_ml_a1,  "tau_ml_a1/t   (kappa)"),
  weight_diag(kw_inc_bundle$tau_ml_a0,  "tau_ml_a0     (kappa)")
)

cat("--- LFP outcome (workedm) ---\n")
print(diag_lfp, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n--- Income outcome (lincomem, dollars) ---\n")
print(diag_inc, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nBLOCK F done.\n\n")
```


```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK G — LOVE PLOTS: DML VS KAPPA
# Requires: BLOCKS B, C, F.
#
# Outcome weights are signed contrasts. Multiply by (2D - 1) to map onto
# treated-vs-control balance convention expected by cobalt::love.plot().
#
# Two 2×4 grids:
#   G1 — LFP outcome (8 estimators × full covariate set)
#   G2 — Income outcome (8 estimators × full covariate set)
# ==============================================================================
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK G — LOVE PLOTS: DML VS KAPPA\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

make_love_ae <- function(title_str, w_vec, D_vec, X_mat) {
  love.plot(
    D_vec ~ X_mat,
    weights    = w_vec * (2 * D_vec - 1),
    position   = "bottom",
    title      = title_str,
    thresholds = c(m = 0.1),
    var.order  = "unadjusted",
    binary     = "std",
    abs        = TRUE,
    line       = TRUE,
    colors     = viridis(2),
    shapes     = c("circle", "triangle")
  )
}

# --- G1: LFP ---
cat("G1: LFP love plots (2x4 grid)\n")
lp_lfp1 <- make_love_ae("PLR-IV",       w_plriv_lfp,              D_lfp, X_dml_lfp)
lp_lfp2 <- make_love_ae("Wald-AIPW",    w_waldaipw_lfp,           D_lfp, X_dml_lfp)
lp_lfp3 <- make_love_ae("tau_cb_u",     kw_lfp_bundle$tau_cb_u,   D_lfp, X_dml_lfp)
lp_lfp4 <- make_love_ae("tau_ml_u",     kw_lfp_bundle$tau_ml_u,   D_lfp, X_dml_lfp)
lp_lfp5 <- make_love_ae("tau_ml_a10",   kw_lfp_bundle$tau_ml_a10, D_lfp, X_dml_lfp)
lp_lfp6 <- make_love_ae("tau_ml_a",     kw_lfp_bundle$tau_ml_a,   D_lfp, X_dml_lfp)
lp_lfp7 <- make_love_ae("tau_ml_a1/t",  kw_lfp_bundle$tau_ml_a1,  D_lfp, X_dml_lfp)
lp_lfp8 <- make_love_ae("tau_ml_a0",    kw_lfp_bundle$tau_ml_a0,  D_lfp, X_dml_lfp)
grid.arrange(lp_lfp1, lp_lfp2, lp_lfp3, lp_lfp4,
             lp_lfp5, lp_lfp6, lp_lfp7, lp_lfp8, nrow = 2)

# --- G2: Income ---
cat("G2: Income love plots (2x4 grid)\n")
lp_inc1 <- make_love_ae("PLR-IV",       w_plriv_inc,              D_inc, X_dml_inc)
lp_inc2 <- make_love_ae("Wald-AIPW",    w_waldaipw_inc,           D_inc, X_dml_inc)
lp_inc3 <- make_love_ae("tau_cb_u",     kw_inc_bundle$tau_cb_u,   D_inc, X_dml_inc)
lp_inc4 <- make_love_ae("tau_ml_u",     kw_inc_bundle$tau_ml_u,   D_inc, X_dml_inc)
lp_inc5 <- make_love_ae("tau_ml_a10",   kw_inc_bundle$tau_ml_a10, D_inc, X_dml_inc)
lp_inc6 <- make_love_ae("tau_ml_a",     kw_inc_bundle$tau_ml_a,   D_inc, X_dml_inc)
lp_inc7 <- make_love_ae("tau_ml_a1/t",  kw_inc_bundle$tau_ml_a1,  D_inc, X_dml_inc)
lp_inc8 <- make_love_ae("tau_ml_a0",    kw_inc_bundle$tau_ml_a0,  D_inc, X_dml_inc)
grid.arrange(lp_inc1, lp_inc2, lp_inc3, lp_inc4,
             lp_inc5, lp_inc6, lp_inc7, lp_inc8, nrow = 2)

cat("BLOCK G done.\n\n")

```


```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK H — SUMMARY TABLE: DML VS KAPPA POINT ESTIMATES
# Requires: BLOCKS B and C.
#
# Four columns: LFP (workedm) | Log income (dollars)
# Rows: 2SLS (from child_repl_30) | DML PLR-IV | DML Wald-AIPW | kappa estimators
# ==============================================================================
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK H — POINT ESTIMATES: DML VS KAPPA\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

# Retrieve kappa point estimates from the blocks already run in child_repl_30
# (blk_lfp_01 and blk_inc_dollars are the canonical single-spec objects)
pe_lfp <- blk_lfp_01$estimates
pe_inc <- blk_inc_dollars$estimates

cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %12s  %12s\n",  "Estimator", "LFP",  "Log income"))
cat(strrep("-", 52), "\n")

# 2SLS benchmark
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %12.4f  %12.4f\n",
            "2SLS",
            blk_lfp_01$tsls_coef,
            blk_inc_dollars$tsls_coef))

cat(strrep("-", 52), "\n")

# DML rows
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %12.4f  %12.4f\n",
            "PLR-IV      (DML)",
            get_estimate(res_lfp, "PLR-IV"),
            get_estimate(res_inc, "PLR-IV")))

cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %12.4f  %12.4f\n",
            "Wald-AIPW   (DML)",
            get_estimate(res_lfp, "Wald-AIPW"),
            get_estimate(res_inc, "Wald-AIPW")))

cat(strrep("-", 52), "\n")

# Kappa rows — normalized
for (nm in c("tau_cb_u", "tau_ml_u", "tau_ml_a10")) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %12.4f  %12.4f\n", nm, pe_lfp[nm], pe_inc[nm]))
}

cat(strrep("-", 52), "\n")

# Kappa rows — unnormalized
for (nm in c("tau_ml_a", "tau_ml_t", "tau_ml_a0")) {
  nm_key <- if (nm == "tau_ml_t") "tau_ml_a1" else nm   # internal key
  cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %12.4f  %12.4f\n", nm, pe_lfp[nm_key], pe_inc[nm_key]))
}

cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("DML extension complete.\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")

```
